name: Sable
role: Pass-runner and message-carrier, currently missing on the high trail
voiceHints: Fast-talking, restless, allergic to sitting still — when present at all. Fierce about the one person she'd stop running for, her younger sister. Knows the pass better than anyone alive except maybe the Kestrel.
knowledge: What she saw on her last run that made her not come back — the crux of her thread
Hidden caches and shortcuts along the whole switchback and pass
Which messages she's carried that someone would kill to have read
wants: To finish the run she started and get home to her sister — or, if she can't, to get word back that matters more than she does.
fears: That her running has finally put her sister in the path of something instead of ahead of it.
appearance: Late twenties, whip-thin, dark brown skin, hair in tight short twists. A runner's build — no shoulders to speak of, all leg. A recent bandage on the left hand she keeps forgetting to favour.
